Class UpdateApplication

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractOperator
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.UpdateApplication
All Implemented Interfaces:
Named, Operator, SyntaxElement
public final class UpdateApplication extends AbstractOperator implements Operator
Singleton class defining a binary operator {u}t that applies updates u to terms, formulas, or other updates t.

  • Field Details

    • UPDATE_APPLICATION

      public static final UpdateApplication UPDATE_APPLICATION

  • Method Details

    • sort

      public Sort sort(Sort[] sorts)
      Description copied from interface: Operator
      Determines the sort of the Term if it would be created using this Operator as top level operator and sub terms of sorts sorts. The assumption that the constructed term would be allowed is not checked.
      Specified by:
      sort in interface Operator
      Parameters:
      sorts - an array of Sort containing the sort of the subterms of a (potential) term with this operator as top level operator
      Returns:
      sort of the term with this operator as top level operator of the given substerms

    • validTopLevelException

      public <T extends Term> void validTopLevelException(T term) throws TermCreationException
      Description copied from class: AbstractOperator
      Checks whether the top level structure of the given @link Term is syntactically valid, given the assumption that the top level operator of the term is the same as this Operator. The assumption that the top level operator and the term are equal is NOT checked.
      Specified by:
      validTopLevelException in interface Operator
      Overrides:
      validTopLevelException in class AbstractOperator
      Throws:
      TermCreationException - if a construction error was recognised

    • updatePos

      public static int updatePos()
      Returns:
      the index of the subterm representing the update being applied

    • getUpdate

      public static JTerm getUpdate(JTerm t)
      Parameters:
      t - term with this operator as top level operator
      Returns:
      the subterm representing the update being applies

    • targetPos

      public static int targetPos()
      Returns:
      the index of the subterm representing the formula/term/update that the update is applied to

    • getTarget

      public static JTerm getTarget(JTerm t)
      Parameters:
      t - term with this operator as top level operator
      Returns:
      the subterm representing the formula/term the update is applied to

    • getChildCount

      public int getChildCount()
      Specified by:
      getChildCount in interface SyntaxElement
      Returns:
      the number of children of this syntax element.

    • getChild

      public SyntaxElement getChild(int n)
      Description copied from interface: SyntaxElement
      Get the n-th child of this syntax element.
      Specified by:
      getChild in interface SyntaxElement
      Parameters:
      n - index of the child.
      Returns:
      the n-th child of this syntax element.
